title: Higuma Humiliates Shanks in the Bar
description: On pages 17–20, this part follows the Romance Dawn flashback and focuses on how Luffy’s pirate dream is formed through Shanks, Higuma, and the straw hat promise.
scene: Higuma and his bandits enter the bar, testing Shanks’ patience while Luffy watches the insult with anger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, don't wet yourselves. We're not here to bust up the place. Just sell us 10 barrels of Grog, and we'll injure only the bare minimum.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We just ran out of liquor.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THAT'S STRANGE. WHAT'RE ALL THESE PIRATES DRINKING?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I just served the last of it.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Guess we drank up all the liquor.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WHAT DO YOU TAKE ME FOR?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU CAN'T MAKE A FOOL OF ME!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WHAT GOOD IS ONE BOTTLE OF GROG?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WATCH YOURSELF... IF YOU'RE FOND OF BREATH- ING!

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: IF YOU'RE SMART YOU'LL SAIL AWAY FROM HERE SO I NEVER SEE YOU AGAIN.

summary: Higuma humiliates Shanks in front of the bar, but Shanks refuses to escalate. Luffy sees this as cowardice, creating the emotional setup for what comes later.
